evals.name: node-cli-fresh-readme
evals.prompt: Write a README for my project at /Users/psenger/Developer/ai-agent-skills/skills/readme-writer-workspace/projects/squash-cli
evals.expected_output: A complete README.md with: centered <div align="center"> header block, bold tagline, badges, nav links, hook paragraph, Installation section with the correct npm install command, Quickstart/Usage section with realistic examples, License section. No placeholder text left unfilled.

evals.name: python-library-readme
evals.prompt: I need docs for this package at /Users/psenger/Developer/ai-agent-skills/skills/readme-writer-workspace/projects/data-lens — it's a library people import into their Python projects
evals.expected_output: A complete README.md with: centered header, correct pip install command (pip install data-lens), import-based quickstart showing a real API call, Configuration or API section. Should classify correctly as a library/SDK (not CLI) since the user clarified the primary usage.

evals.name: rewrite-bad-readme
evals.prompt: The README for my project is terrible, fix it. Project is at /Users/psenger/Developer/ai-agent-skills/skills/readme-writer-workspace/projects/bad-readme-project
evals.expected_output: A rewritten README.md that: removes marketing language (powerful, cutting-edge, etc.), replaces emoji-bullet features with specific capabilities, fixes the install command (removes $ prompt), adds realistic usage examples, uses centered header pattern. Should read the existing README.md and produce a clearly improved version.
